data.title: Pacific Booker Minerals Closes $4 Million Private Placement to Advance Morrison Project
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Pacific Booker Minerals ( (TSE:BKM) ) just unveiled an update.

On July 16, 2026, Pacific Booker Minerals Inc. reported that it had closed a non-brokered private placement, raising gross proceeds of approximately $4.0 million through the issuance of 1,860,466 units at $2.15 per unit, each comprising one common share and a three-year warrant exercisable at $2.37, subject to a four-month-plus-one-day hold and final TSX Venture Exchange approval. The financing, which included participation by a company director and payment of modest finder’s fees, is intended to fund an updated NI 43-101 mineral resource estimate, a comprehensive NI 43-101 pre-feasibility study and supporting technical, environmental, permitting and stakeholder engagement work for the Morrison Project, bolstering the company’s technical dataset and informing its ongoing strategic review.

The decision to advance the Morrison Project to the pre-feasibility stage followed a recommendation from Pacific Booker’s independent Technical Advisory Board, which concluded that sufficient geological, metallurgical, engineering and environmental information exists to support this next phase, reinforcing confidence in the project’s progression. Management and the board expect that completing the updated resource and pre-feasibility study will provide a modern technical evaluation, enhance transparency for investors and other stakeholders, and potentially improve the company’s positioning as it evaluates strategic options for the asset.

Spark’s Take on BKM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BKM is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects a speculative financial base (no revenue, ongoing losses, and negative equity) partially offset by improved TTM cash generation. Technicals are supportive with a strong uptrend, but overbought signals increase near-term pullback risk. Valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no indicated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on BKM stock,
click here.

More about Pacific Booker Minerals

Pacific Booker Minerals Inc. is a Vancouver-based mineral exploration and development company listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the symbol BKM and trading over the counter as PBMLF. The company is focused on advancing its Morrison copper-gold-molybdenum project in British Columbia, targeting the evaluation and potential development of this resource through staged technical studies and permitting activities.

Average Trading Volume: 13,235

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$41.49M

Natural Gas Services Group ( (NGS) ) has shared an announcement.

On July 20, 2026, Natural Gas Services Group, Inc. entered into new indemnification agreements with each of its directors and executive officers, replacing all prior arrangements that covered these individuals. The updated agreements provide for indemnification and advancement of expenses related to actions or proceedings arising from their service with the company or at its request, clarifying protections for leadership and potentially strengthening the company’s governance and risk management posture.

The company also filed a legal opinion from Jones & Keller, P.C. to support its ongoing registration statements on Form S-8, linking the updated indemnification framework to existing securities filings. This step integrates the new legal protections for management with the firm’s broader compliance obligations, which may provide greater certainty to directors, officers and other stakeholders regarding the legal infrastructure around executive service.

Baytex Energy said on July 23, 2026, that it will publish its second-quarter 2026 financial and operating results after markets close on July 30, 2026. The company will host a conference call and webcast on July 31, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. MDT to discuss the results, with a replay to be made available via its website, underscoring its ongoing efforts to engage investors and provide transparency around performance.

The announcement, filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as a Form 6-K, signals Baytex’s continued emphasis on disciplined execution and shareholder communication. By highlighting its core Canadian assets and planned investor outreach, the company reinforces its positioning as a cash-generative upstream player in North American energy markets, with implications for investors tracking its operational and financial trajectory.

data.title: Volito Grants Bulten CEO Call Options Without Dilution for Shareholders
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

An announcement from Bulten AB ( (SE:BULTEN) ) is now available.

Volito AB, the largest shareholder in Swedish fastener manufacturer Bulten, has issued 150,000 call options on Bulten shares to the company’s Chief Executive Officer, Axel Berntsson. The options, valued at about SEK 319,500 using the Black-Scholes model, give Berntsson the right to buy one share per option at an exercise price of SEK 100 between July 2026 and July 2029.

The transaction was initiated solely by Volito and does not involve Bulten, incur costs for the company, or dilute existing shareholders. The move further aligns the CEO’s incentives with long-term shareholder value, underscoring confidence from the principal owner while preserving the capital structure and ownership interests of other investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:BULTEN) stock is a Buy
with a SEK58.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bulten AB stock,
see the SE:BULTEN Stock Forecast page.

More about Bulten AB

Bulten Group is a leading global precision manufacturer and full-service provider of C-parts, offering standard and specially adapted fasteners and micro-fasteners. Founded in 1873 and headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden, the company operates worldwide with around 570 employees, generates annual sales exceeding SEK 3 billion, and is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm.

Average Trading Volume: 39,631

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: SEK1.09B

data.title: Starfighters Space Appoints CBIZ as Independent Auditor
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Starfighters Space, Inc. ( (FJET) ) has provided an announcement.

On July 24, 2026, Starfighters Space, Inc. announced that its Audit Committee, with board approval, has engaged CBIZ CPAs P.C. as its independent registered public accounting firm, reinforcing the financial oversight expected of a public company. Management framed the appointment as a key step in supporting the company’s growth as it scales operations and enhances its public company capabilities.

Since going public in December 2025, Starfighters has completed wind tunnel testing for its STARLAUNCH program, advanced it into Critical Design Review with GE Aerospace, expanded operations in Midland, Texas, secured a $17.5 million strategic investment, and joined the Russell 3000 Index. These milestones underscore rapid progress in building out its commercial aerospace and launch capabilities, potentially strengthening its position in the emerging commercial space and hypersonic testing markets.

More about Starfighters Space, Inc.

Starfighters Space, Inc. is a commercial space company focused on high-speed flight operations, hypersonic testing, space research, pilot training, and future air-launch capabilities. Operating from NASA’s Kennedy Space Center in Florida and the Midland Air and Space Port in Texas, it maintains the world’s only commercial fleet of flight-ready F-104 supersonic aircraft capable of sustained Mach 2+ operations.

The company is advancing its STARLAUNCH responsive airborne launch platform, targeting commercial, government, research, and national security missions. Its operational capabilities span payload deployment, airborne space testing, microgravity and high-speed flight environments, and reusable airborne launch infrastructure to support the growing commercial space economy.

Average Trading Volume: 2,074,425

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $184.6M

Learn more about FJET stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Ridgeview Weighs £545m Takeover of Pinewood.AI with Cash and Rollover Option
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

The latest update is out from Pinewood Technologies ( (GB:PINE) ).

Pinewood Technologies Group PLC has received a non-binding proposal from U.K. Piston Bidco Limited, a vehicle indirectly owned by Ridgeview Partners LLC, for the entire share capital of Pinewood.AI at £4.48 per share in cash. The indicative valuation of about £545 million implies substantial premiums to recent trading prices, and the board has signalled it would be minded to recommend the offer if it becomes firm.

Alongside the cash proposal, Ridgeview is offering a capped rollover option allowing eligible shareholders to exchange shares for unlisted interests in a Cayman-based vehicle, subject to allocation limits and complex governance and distribution rights. Nearly half of Pinewood.AI’s shareholders have issued letters of intent supporting the possible offer, with a significant portion also indicating plans to elect for the rollover alternative, underscoring strong investor backing and potentially accelerating a change of control in the automotive software provider.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:PINE) stock is a Buy
with a £500.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pinewood Technologies stock,
see the GB:PINE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PINE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PINE is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved financial safety from very low leverage, tempered by lower-quality/volatile earnings and inconsistent cash conversion. Valuation is supportive with a low P/E, while technicals remain weak-to-mixed due to price below longer-term moving averages and a negative MACD. Earnings-call commentary adds moderate support via reiterated long-term EBITDA guidance and contract visibility, but execution and cash-generation risks remain.

To see Spark’s full report on PINE stock,
click here.

More about Pinewood Technologies

Pinewood Technologies Group, trading as Pinewood.AI, operates in the automotive technology sector, providing software and digital solutions to car retailers and related partners. The group focuses on leveraging artificial intelligence and data-driven platforms to support dealership operations and enhance efficiency in the wider automotive retail market.

Ridgeview Partners LLC, through newly formed entities, is positioning itself as a financial sponsor aiming to acquire full control of Pinewood.AI via a dedicated bid vehicle.

Average Trading Volume: 491,231

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £351.4M

data.title: Haoxin Holdings Reshapes Board and Wins Nasdaq Extension on Bid-Price Compliance
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Haoxin Holdings Limited Class A ( (HXHX) ) has issued an announcement.

On June 23, 2026, Haoxin Holdings Limited saw the resignations of independent directors Bangjie Hu and Mikael Charette, who also chaired key audit and compensation committees, with their departures effective July 8, 2026. On July 20, 2026, the board moved to stabilize governance by appointing veteran investment banker Ro Phansalkar and finance executive Mengzhi Wang as independent directors and new chairs of the compensation and audit committees, respectively, reinforcing board independence and committee oversight.

Separately, the company disclosed that Nasdaq granted it an additional 180-day extension, until December 14, 2026, to regain compliance with the exchange’s $1.00 minimum bid price requirement after failing to do so by the initial June 15, 2026 deadline. Haoxin plans to monitor its share price and may execute a reverse stock split if needed, but faces the risk of delisting and a potential appeal process if it cannot restore compliance during the extended period, a development closely watched by shareholders and creditors.

More about Haoxin Holdings Limited Class A

Haoxin Holdings Limited is a China-based company whose Class A ordinary shares trade on the Nasdaq Capital Market, subject to U.S. listing requirements. The company operates through a board structure that relies on independent directors and specialized committees for audit, compensation and nominating functions to support corporate governance and regulatory compliance.

Average Trading Volume: 1,793,340

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $7.3M

Learn more about HXHX stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Saga Pure ASA ( (DE:SAT) ) has issued an announcement.

Saga Pure ASA has repurchased 201,838 of its own shares in the market at NOK 1.60 per share, utilizing a mandate granted by shareholders at the May 2026 annual general meeting. Following this transaction, the company now holds 32,445,548 treasury shares, representing 4.81% of its outstanding share capital, signaling ongoing capital management and potential confidence in its valuation.

The buyback increases Saga Pure’s flexibility in managing its balance sheet and capital structure, which may support share liquidity or future corporate actions. Lloyds Banking ( (GB:LLOY) ) has provided an announcement.

Lloyds Banking Group has repurchased 1,000,000 of its ordinary shares on 24 July 2026 as part of its ongoing share buyback programme, paying a volume-weighted average price of 113.4169 pence per share, with prices ranging between 113 and 114 pence. The bank plans to cancel the repurchased shares, a move that will reduce its share count and can enhance earnings per share, underscoring continued capital return to shareholders within the framework of its previously announced buyback strategy.

The transaction was executed by Goldman Sachs International acting as broker under instructions originally issued in January 2026, aligning the latest purchases with the group’s broader capital management plans. By steadily executing its authorised buyback and cancelling the acquired stock, Lloyds is signalling confidence in its balance sheet strength and capital generation, which may support its valuation and reassure investors about disciplined capital allocation.

data.title: OPT boosts free float as greenshoe fully exercised after Euronext debut
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

OPT S.P.A. ( (IT:OPTS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

OPT S.p.A., a provider of integrated high value-added healthcare services in Italy, supports pharmaceutical companies and hospitals through a scalable platform that combines clinical, digital and managerial expertise. Its end-to-end operating model and “buy & build” acquisition strategy aim to consolidate a fragmented market and enhance data-driven, integrated care pathways.

The company announced that Integrae SIM has fully exercised the greenshoe option related to its recent IPO, adding 287,500 shares at €0.70 each for a total of €201,250. This brings the overall capital increase placement to 2,857,500 shares worth €2,000,250 and raises OPT’s free float to 36.09%, strengthening its market liquidity and capital base, while the firm reported no stabilisation activities by the global coordinator since listing on Euronext Growth Milan.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:OPTS) stock is a Buy
with a EUR1.25 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on OPT S.P.A. stock,
see the IT:OPTS Stock Forecast page.

More about OPT S.P.A.

OPT S.p.A. operates as a specialised platform for High Value-Added Healthcare Services within the Italian healthcare ecosystem, focusing on clinical and organisational solutions. It positions itself between pharmaceutical companies and hospitals, leveraging a broad network of over 80 healthcare facilities and major pharma groups, and offers an integrated “one-stop-shop” model combining clinical governance, quality certification, scientific events, digital solutions and medical writing.
